推荐场景: 餐厅座位旁｜听懂菜单推荐
60秒任务: 「看菜单」：菜单/偏好/限制确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 点餐｜偏好｜限制｜推荐｜账单｜礼貌请求
场景族: 咖啡店｜餐厅｜外卖柜台｜朋友聚餐｜食堂
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Can I see the menu?（看菜单）
What do you recommend?（询问推荐）
Is this dish spicy?（确认口味）
What is in this dish?（询问内容）
Do you have a lunch menu?（午餐菜单）
I would like something light.（偏好）
I don’t eat ___.（忌口）
Can I have water first?（先要水）
This looks good.（选择）
Is there a vegetarian option?（素食选择）
How much is this meal?（询价）
I need a few more minutes.（需要时间）
We are ready to order.（准备点餐）
Could you explain this, please?（请求解释）
Thank you, I’ll choose this one.（决定）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: menu, dish, meal, lunch, water, option, rice, noodles, soup, salad
Verbs: see, order, recommend, choose, explain, eat, ask
Adjectives: spicy, light, vegetarian, cheap, expensive, good
Time / Place: first, now, lunch time, here
Chunks: lunch menu, vegetarian option, this dish, ready to order, few more minutes
